items.title_en: Human Rights Foundation Grants 1.3 Billion Satoshis to 22 Freedom Tech Projects Worldwide in Q4 2025
items.title_ur: Human Rights Foundation Grants 1.3 Billion Satoshis to 22 Freedom Tech Projects Worldwide in Q4 2025
summary_en: Human Rights Foundation Grants 1.3 Billion Satoshis to 22 Freedom Tech Projects Worldwide in Q4 2025

Bitcoin Magazine Human Rights Foundation Grants 1.3 Billion Satoshis to 22 Freedom Tech Projects Worldwide in Q4 2025 The Human Rights Foundation (HRF) gave 1.3 billion satoshis in new grants from its Bitcoin Development Fund last quarter.
This post Human Rights Foundation Grants 1.3 Billion Satoshis to 22 Freedom Tech Projects Worldwide in Q4 2025 first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman .
Watch market reaction and follow-up official updates.

summary_en: Bitcoin Price Rockets 5.5% Past $96,000, Strategy ($MSTR) Jumps 8%

Bitcoin Magazine Bitcoin Price Rockets 5.5% Past $96,000, Strategy ($MSTR) Jumps 8% The Bitcoin price roared past the $96,000 level this afternoon, bringing along a fresh wave of bullish momentum after weeks of choppy, range-bound trading.
This post Bitcoin Price Rockets 5.5% Past $96,000, Strategy ($MSTR) Jumps 8% first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman .

items.title_ur: Strive ($ASST) Gets Green Light on Semler Scientific Acquisition, Boosts Bitcoin Holdings to Nearly 13,000 BTC
summary_en: Strive ($ASST) Gets Green Light on Semler Scientific Acquisition, Boosts Bitcoin Holdings to Nearly 13,000 BTC

Bitcoin Magazine Strive ($ASST) Gets Green Light on Semler Scientific Acquisition, Boosts Bitcoin Holdings to Nearly 13,000 BTC Strive has won shareholder approval to acquire Semler Scientific in an all-stock deal that adds more than 5,000 bitcoin to its balance sheet, lifting combined holdings to nearly 12,800 BTC.
This post Strive ($ASST) Gets Green Light on Semler Scientific Acquisition, Boosts Bitcoin Holdings to Nearly 13,000 BTC first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman .
Watch market reaction and follow-up official updates.

Bitcoin Magazine Bitcoin Price Briefly Jumps Above $92,800 As CPI Meets Forecasts, Powell DOJ Dispute Fuels Safe-Haven Bid The bitcoin price briefly rose above $92,700 after December U.S.
